title: School Barricade — Unstable Former Student with Demand Drift
brief: A 22-year-old former student has barricaded himself in a classroom with a teacher and 5 students. He was expelled 2 years ago and blames the school for ruining his life. He has a knife. His emotional state is highly volatile — oscillating between rage and despair. He has exaggerated the number of hostages. Demands are expected to shift multiple times.

demands.text: I want the principal to apologize on camera
I want my expulsion removed from my record

new_demand.text: I want my parents here. I want them to see what this school did to me.

demand_drift.announcement: You know what? Forget the principal. Get my parents here. I want my mom and dad to see what this place turned me into.

opening_message: I have 10 people in here and a knife! This school DESTROYED my life! I want the principal here NOW to apologize for what they did to me! And I want my record cleared! I'm not leaving until someone takes responsibility!
